name: workflow state history records every prior transition with timestamps for audit
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to plan --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z 2>/dev/null && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/transition.sh" --to build --state-file .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --now 2026-05-13T01:00:00Z 2>err.txt && grep -q '"to":"plan"' .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && grep -q '"to":"build"' .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && echo ok 1>&2
